channel.title: Ric 03 on Ric - An unknown artist

item.title: Sailing ship (Ric 03)
item.description: Short description: Sailing ship next to a harbour / town Notes: Found on eBay. Similar to Ric 17 , but this one is signed a bit different. Other entries for this work
